title: Cozy Beachfront Villa in Kendwa
description: Beautiful villa steps from the white sandy beach, featuring 2 bedrooms, open living area, and stunning ocean views. Perfect for couples or small families seeking a tranquil retreat.

title: Spacious Family House in Bububu
description: Modern 3-bedroom house with a large garden, ideal for families. Close to local markets and schools, with secure parking and 24/7 security.

title: Luxury Sea View Apartment in Paje
description: Top-floor apartment with panoramic Indian Ocean views, modern amenities, and direct beach access. Includes Wi-Fi, air conditioning, and a fully equipped kitchen.

title: Charming Cottage in Kiwengwa
description: Traditional Swahili-style cottage with thatched roof, offering a peaceful atmosphere. Features one bedroom, outdoor seating area, and easy access to the lagoon.

title: Historic Stone Town Loft
description: Renovated loft in the heart of Stone Town, exposing original coral stone walls. Close to museums, restaurants, and the ferry terminal.

title: Beach Bungalow in Jambiani
description: Private bungalow just steps from the beach, with a veranda overlooking the turquoise water. Ideal for snorkeling enthusiasts and sunset lovers.

title: Modern Apartment in Chumbuni
description: Newly built 2-bedroom apartment with modern fittings, secure building, and close to public transport. Great for professionals working in Zanzibar City.

title: Family Home near Uwanja wa Ndege
description: Large 4-bedroom house with a spacious backyard, perfect for gatherings. Located near the airport and major highways for easy travel.

title: Budget Studio in Mchina
description: Compact studio apartment with basic amenities, suitable for solo travelers or short stays. Walking distance to local eateries and shops.

title: Seaview Villa in Paje
description: Exclusive villa with private pool, direct beach access, and three bedrooms. Includes daily housekeeping and chef service upon request.

title: Garden House in Bububu
description: Charming house with a lush garden, two bedrooms, and a patio for outdoor dining. Quiet neighborhood with friendly neighbors.

title: Luxury Suite in Stone Town
description: Elegant suite in a restored historic building, featuring high ceilings, antique furniture, and modern bathroom. Walking distance to Forodhani Gardens.

title: Beachfront Bungalow in Kiwengwa
description: Direct beach access bungalow with outdoor shower, perfect for honeymooners. Includes a small kitchenette and lounge area.

title: Shared Apartment in Kendwa
description: Furnished room in a shared apartment, ideal for backpackers. Includes shared kitchen, lounge, and Wi-Fi. Close to nightlife and beach parties.

title: Eco-Friendly Villa in Jambiani
description: Sustainable villa built with local materials, solar powered, and featuring rainwater harvesting. Offers a unique eco-tourism experience.
